name: Sarah Joseph
title: Partner
bio: Sarah has nine years working in the lending industry, specializing in helping non-traditional borrowers secure the credit they deserve. Before that she was an account executive at AT&T helping local franchisees get the support they needed to succeed. She takes pride in guiding business owners through the financing process with clarity and patience. A lifelong resident of the region, she understands the unique challenges and opportunities facing local businesses. She is a proud Alumna of Siena College.

name: Craig Saia
title: Partner
bio: Craig has over three decades of experience in the lending industry. He has worked with a wide range of borrowers and has deep connections to local lenders across the Capital District. He's been a resident of the region for over 30 years and is committed to helping local businesses thrive through access to the capital they need to grow.
